overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark robes exploring a gothic castle interior. The character ascends a grand stone staircase and traverses torch-lit corridors with high vaulted ceilings and medieval architecture. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with warm torchlight illuminating the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with tall vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand stone staircase toward the upper hall

entered.detail: tall yellow-green banner with heraldic design hanging on stone wall
wide stone stairs with worn steps ascending to upper level
burning torch mounted on stone wall providing warm orange light
ornate stone balustrade along the right side of the staircase
large hanging chandelier with multiple lights visible in the upper hall
high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic architecture

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the bottom of a grand stone staircase in a vast gothic hall. A large tapestry banner hangs on the wall to the left, while torches provide warm illumination. The character ascends the stairs toward an upper hall where a chandelier is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony hall with ornate chandelier

events.description: reaches top of staircase and enters the open upper hall area
approaches the archway entrance to a narrower corridor

agents.ego_description: crossing the upper hall toward the corridor entrance, passing under the chandelier

entered.detail: stone archway marking the entrance to a narrow corridor
heavy wooden door with metal studs set into the stone wall
paired torch sconces mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character traverses the upper hall beneath an ornate chandelier. The space opens up before narrowing toward a stone archway entrance. A heavy wooden door is visible on the left wall as the character approaches the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with wooden door

events.description: enters the narrow enclosed corridor from the open hall
turns corner into section with rubble and debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit stone corridor, passing the wooden door

entered.detail: thick stone support columns along the corridor wall
pile of broken stones and debris on the corridor floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open hall into a narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall sconces. The space becomes more confined with rough stone walls. After passing a wooden door, the character turns a corner where rubble and debris begin to appear on the floor.

agents.ego_description: navigating through the rubble-strewn corridor toward the large door at the end

entered.detail: massive metal-reinforced door at the end of the corridor
scattered stones and broken tiles covering the corridor floor

segments.scene_description: The final section of the corridor is littered with debris and broken stones. The character walks toward a large reinforced door at the corridor's end. Wall torches continue to provide the only illumination in this increasingly dilapidated section of the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grandeur of a vast gothic hall into the claustrophobic decay of a ruined corridor. It begins at the base of a grand stone staircase beneath a large tapestry, ascending toward an upper hall where a distant chandelier casts a warm glow. As the character reaches the top, the space opens briefly under the ornate chandelier before narrowing toward a stone archway and a heavy wooden door. The scene then shifts into a confined stone corridor illuminated by wall sconces, where the polished architecture gives way to rough walls and scattered rubble. Finally, the camera moves through this increasingly dilapidated passage, passing broken stones and debris before arriving at a large reinforced door at the corridor's end.
